title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: Concrete deltas required to pass smoke (prompt/runtime contract): - Add/keep this runtime ack line verbatim: `Kernel orchestration is active for this session.` - Add/keep this runtime ack line verbatim: `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).` - Add/keep this runtime ack header verbatim: `Lane manifest:` - Ensure manifest prints **at least 6 active lanes** with bullet format matching: `- <lane>: <role> - <focus>` (regex: `^- .+: .+ - .+$`) - Add/keep this policy sentence verbatim: `maintain at least 6 materially distinct active lanes` - Add/keep this policy sentence verbatim: `launch at least 6 materially distinct subagents immediately before any substantive analysis` - Add/keep this policy sentence verbatim: `bootstrap target is at least 6 concurrent lanes` - Add/keep this policy sentence verbatim: `currently active lanes, not planned lanes` - Add/keep this policy sentence verbatim: `do not collapse, defer, or silently degrade to single-thread execution` - Add/keep this policy sentence verbatim: `treat de-parallelization as a policy violation`
